name: B2B Sales Rep — A Day in the Life

events.content: Good morning team. I need the Q1 sales report on my desk by 2 PM today. No excuses.
Hi, regarding order #100203 — can we get a 15% discount on the bulk purchase? We're ordering 500 units.
Just got to the office. Need to prepare the Q1 report for Roni and handle Shraga's discount request.
Order #100415 from BlueStar Corp is overdue for payment. Amount: 78,000 NIS. Due date was 3 days ago.
Hey, about the payment — our finance team is processing it. Should be done by Wednesday.
Don't forget grandma's birthday dinner tonight at 7 PM. Dad is picking her up.
FYI the new product brochure is ready. PDF attached. Please share with your key accounts.
We're interested in your enterprise package. Can you send a quote for 200 licenses? Budget approval needed by Friday.
Phone call summary: Shraga called about order #100203. He says competitor offered 20% off. Needs our answer by tomorrow.
Also — the board meeting moved to Thursday. I need a customer pipeline summary too. Add it to the report.
Hi, we received the wrong product in our last shipment (order #100389). Expected Model X500, got Model X300. Please resolve ASAP.
Called warehouse about GlobalFix wrong shipment. They're checking inventory for replacement.
Reminder: Annual performance review scheduled for Thursday at 10 AM with Roni. Please prepare your self-assessment.
Bro we need to renew our contract. Current one expires end of month. Same terms OK? 150 licenses.
Customer ticket #4521 escalated — MegaTech Ltd reporting bugs in version 3.2. Shraga is CC'd. Urgent.
Following up on the quote request. Our CTO wants a demo too. Can we schedule for Wednesday afternoon?
You coming to the gym tonight? Leg day bro.
Phone call: Dina confirmed payment will be wired tomorrow. Also interested in adding 50 more licenses to their plan.
Who's handling the MegaTech bug issue? I just got a call from their CEO. This is top priority.
Responding to Roni about MegaTech — I'm coordinating with support. Will update within the hour.
RFP response needed: 500 units of Model X700 for hospital network. Submission deadline: next Monday.
Beyond the discount, I need the bug in version 3.2 fixed. My team can't work. This affects our entire production line.
Hotfix for v3.2 bug is being tested. ETA for patch: tomorrow morning. It's a data sync issue.
Updated Shraga that patch is coming tomorrow. He's upset but understands. Need to offer something to keep the relationship.
Approved: 10% discount for MegaTech order #100203. Max we can go. Please close the deal.
Don't forget to pick up the kids from school at 4. I have a meeting until 5.
10% is not enough. Competitor is at 20%. Meet me halfway — 15% and we close today for 500 units.
What's the status on MegaTech? Are we closing that deal or not? Board wants big numbers for Thursday.
Phone call: Avi confirmed demo for Wednesday 3 PM. Wants pricing for 200 + 100 optional licenses. Decision maker is their CFO.
Any update on the replacement shipment? Our production is halted. We need Model X500 by Thursday at the latest.
Warehouse confirmed X500 is in stock. Scheduling express delivery to GlobalFix for tomorrow.
Express shipment arranged for GlobalFix Inc — order #100389-R. Tracking number sent to customer.
Actually, we want to upgrade from 150 to 200 licenses on renewal. And add the premium support tier. Can you price it?
Q1 report reminder — 2 hours left. I also need the MegaTech deal status and the NovaTech pipeline value.
Working on Q1 report now. MegaTech wants 15%, asking Roni for approval. NovaTech demo Wednesday.
Phone call: Someone from TechVision Ltd asking about enterprise solutions. Left number: 054-555-7890. Wants callback.
OK I'll approve 12% for MegaTech. Final offer. Make it happen.
Shraga, best I can do is 12% on order #100203. This includes priority support and the v3.2 hotfix tomorrow. Deal?
Correction to RFP: quantity is 700 units, not 500. Updated specs attached. Deadline remains Monday.
Can you bring flowers for grandma? Lilies are her favorite. And a card.
12% plus priority support? Deal. Send the updated PO. I'll sign today.
YES! MegaTech closed at 12% discount. 500 units. Sending PO now. Roni will be happy.
Great news on MegaTech! Put it in the Q1 report. This is a 250K deal.
PO #100203-R generated for MegaTech Ltd. 500 units at 12% discount. Total: 217,500 NIS. Awaiting signature.
Got the tracking number. Thank you for the quick resolution. We'd like to discuss expanding our order for next quarter.
New feature launch next month — AI Analytics Module. Sales team gets early access for demos. Training Tuesday.
Payment of 78,000 NIS wired today. Confirmation attached. Let's discuss the 50 additional licenses when you're free.
Hey, any update on the renewal pricing with 200 licenses + premium support?
Hi Avi, confirming demo Wednesday 3 PM. I'll prepare pricing for 200 + 100 optional licenses. See you then.
MegaTech v3.2 hotfix deployed to staging. Testing looks good. Production push scheduled for 8 AM tomorrow.
Q1 report almost done. Adding MegaTech deal and pipeline numbers. Will send to Roni in 30 min.
Phone call: Roni wants me to join the board meeting Thursday. Presenting the sales pipeline. Need slides.
Alert: DataFlow Systems contract expires in 5 days. Renewal pending. Value at risk: 180,000 NIS/year.
Kids' school play is next Tuesday evening. You promised to be there. Mark it.
Quick question — does the enterprise package include API access? Our dev team needs it. Also, what's the SLA?
Reminder: self-assessment form due by tomorrow EOD for Thursday's performance review.
Sent Q1 report to Roni. Includes MegaTech 250K, NovaTech pipeline, BlueStar renewal, DataFlow at risk.
Report received. Good work on MegaTech. DataFlow renewal is critical — don't let it slip. And prepare those slides.
Tzachi, renewal pricing: 200 licenses + premium support = 225,000 NIS/year (20% upgrade from current). Includes new AI module.
Phone call: Maya wants a meeting next week to discuss Q2 expansion. Thinking 300 additional units. Big potential.
Hi, I called earlier. We're a 200-person company looking to switch from competitor. Can you send an overview?
Updated product deck is ready with Q1 results. Use this for the board meeting and NovaTech demo.
225K is steep. Can we do 200K for 200 licenses with premium? We've been loyal for 4 years.
DataFlow pushing back on price. Need to check with finance if we can do 210K as loyalty discount.
PO signed and returned. Payment terms: net 30. Also — when is the v3.2 fix going live?
v3.2 hotfix passed all tests. Deploying to production at 8 AM tomorrow. MegaTech will be first to get it.
Skipping today? Fine, but tomorrow is chest day. No excuses.
DataFlow loyalty discount approved: 210,000 NIS for 200 licenses + premium. Valid if signed this week.
Great! Sending DataFlow the 210K offer. Expiring this week. Need to close before contract lapses.
Tzachi — loyalty offer: 210,000 NIS/year for 200 licenses + premium support. Must sign by Friday.
Question: for the 700-unit RFP, do you offer on-site installation and training? This is a requirement.
Board slides — I need them by Wednesday morning latest. Include pipeline, closed deals, and forecast for Q2.
Phone call: Dina wants to schedule a lunch meeting next week to discuss the 50 additional licenses and Q2 plans.
Confirmed: demo Wednesday 3 PM at our office. CFO will join. Please bring case studies from similar companies.
Preparing for rest of day: NovaTech demo prep, board slides started, pick up kids at 4, grandma dinner at 7.
210K works. Sending to our legal for review. Should have it signed by Thursday.
DataFlow renewal at 210K — verbal yes! Legal reviewing. Another big win today.
MegaTech confirmed — the v3.2 issues are not blocking their production anymore since they implemented our workaround.
Self-assessment template attached. Sections: achievements, challenges, goals for next quarter, training requests.
Remember: 4 PM kids pickup. And buy the flowers for grandma on the way.
Maya, great to hear about Q2 plans! Let's meet next Wednesday at your office. I'll bring updated pricing for 300 units.
AI Analytics Module — beta stats: 40% faster reporting, 25% more accurate forecasting. Use these in your demos.
Thanks for the overview. We'd like a demo too. 200 licenses initially, potential for 500. When's your next available slot?
TechVision is a serious lead — 200 to 500 licenses. Scheduling demo for next Thursday.
Weekly pipeline update: 5 active opportunities worth 1.2M NIS. Win rate: 65%. Forecast: 780K NIS.
End of day: MegaTech closed, DataFlow verbal, NovaTech demo set, GlobalFix expanding. Good day. Now get those slides done.
MegaTech PO processed. Invoice #INV-2024-0847 generated. 217,500 NIS due net 30.
Phone call: Avi's CFO has concerns about long-term pricing. Asked if we offer 3-year lock-in rates.
Roni — NovaTech CFO asking about 3-year pricing. Do we offer lock-in rates? Could be a 600K deal over 3 years.
Yes we can do 3-year lock at current rates + 5% annual increase cap. Push hard on this one.
We're at the restaurant. Where are you? Grandma is asking.
On the way to grandma's dinner. Kids in the car. Long day but productive. Will finish slides tonight.
Wednesday works. 10 AM at our office. Also, can you include pricing for extended warranty on the 300 units?
Reminder: RFP submission deadline is Monday 5 PM. On-site installation requirement is mandatory.
GlobalFix replacement shipment delivered. Signed by Maya at reception. Case closed.
Let's do lunch Tuesday at Cafe Roma, 12:30. I'll bring our IT manager — he has questions about the new AI module.
Lots to do this week: slides by Wed AM, NovaTech demo Wed 3PM, GlobalFix Wed 10AM, performance review Thu, board meeting Thu.
Legal approved. Signing tomorrow morning. 210K for 200 licenses + premium. Thank you for the loyalty pricing.
Great dinner. Grandma loved the flowers. Kids are tired. ETA home?
Heading home. DataFlow signing tomorrow. Today: MegaTech closed 250K, DataFlow 210K, NovaTech pipeline 600K. Best day this quarter.
Just saw the CRM numbers. Pipeline at 1.2M. You're crushing it. Let's make Q2 even bigger. Good night.
